name: Save
concept: Create EmailMessage record(s) and queue for gateway delivery

observed_implementation.signature: Save(fromEmail, fromName, sendTo, sendToName, replyTo, subject, body, testMode, categoryEnum, bccEmails, priorityOrder, externalRefId, smsLogId, attachments, isCcOrBcc, sendFast): bool

name: SendEmailMessages
concept: Bulk-create EmailMessage records for multiple recipients and queue for delivery

observed_implementation.signature: SendEmailMessages(recipients, fromEmail, fromName, replyTo, subject, body, testMode, categoryEnum, bccEmails, priorityOrder, externalRefId, smsLogId, attachments, isCcOrBcc, sendFast): void
observed_steps: Truncates subject to 200 chars, replyTo to 200 chars
For each recipient: creates EmailMessage with Status=Importing (if attachments) or Status=Queued (no attachments); BccEmails only on first recipient
If attachments: InsertEmailAttachments() per message, then set Status=Queued, UpdateEmailMessages()

observations: Save() is a thin single-recipient wrapper around SendEmailMessages()
sendFast=true bypasses background polling — pushes IDs to in-memory channel instead
BccEmails only applied to first recipient in bulk send — observed behavior

name: SaveEmailMessage
concept: Persist a single pre-constructed EmailMessage entity

observed_steps: Returns Result.Ok or Result.Fail with message

name: UpdateEmailMessageStatuses
concept: Apply delivery status updates from SendGrid webhook events with hardcoded transition rules

observed_steps: For each status group: collect valid int IDs (logs error for non-parseable IDs)
Selects overwriting rule set via switch: Opened/SpamReport/Clicked use AlwaysChangeStatuses; Delivered uses DeliveredNoChangeStatuses; others use DefaultNoChangeStatuses
Calls IEmailRepository.UpdateEmailMessageStatuses(ids, status, overwritingStatuses) — returns affected IDs
For updated records with valid SmsLogId: creates CreateSmsLogStatusCommand

observations: AlwaysChangeStatuses / DeliveredNoChangeStatuses / DefaultNoChangeStatuses are hardcoded — content not inspected in this pass
Delivered cannot overwrite Opened — status downgrade prevention observed
Cross-domain side effect: delivery status also written to SmsLog when SmsLogId present

name: CleanupEmailMessages
concept: Delete old EmailAttachment and EmailMessage records

observed_steps: Calls IEmailRepository.CleanupEmailAttachments() — returns deleted row count, logs result
Calls IEmailRepository.CleanupEmailMessages() — returns deleted row count, logs result

observations: Retention period/criteria in repository SQL — not visible from service layer

name: EmailSendBroadcastReceiptAsync
concept: Generate and send broadcast completion receipt email to operator(s)

observed_implementation.signature: EmailSendBroadcastReceiptAsync(SmsGroup, sendToEmailsAndNames, Profile, phoneAndEmailsOnly, testMode): Task
observed_steps: Resolves customer timezone and languageId from profile.CustomerId
Resolves group items per SendMethod: ByLevel → GetAddressesByLevelsAsync(); ByStdReceivers/ByWeatherWarning → StandardReceiverItems; others → SmsGroupItems up to 30,000 (distinct by address fields)
If content non-null: builds subject string, calls SendEmailMessages() with all sendToEmailsAndNames recipients

observations: First recipient in sendToEmailsAndNames is the main receiver per interface comment
Finland (LanguageId == CountryConstants.FinnishLanguageId) omits letter/floor from address output
Attachments sourced from emailContentGenerator.GetAttachments() not from EmailAttachments table

name: SendGridGatewayProcessing
concept: Background worker sends queued EmailMessage records to SendGrid API

observed_steps: Collects distinct SmsGroupIds, pre-fetches blob attachments, downloads to temp disk
For each workload item: validates body/subject non-empty (Status=ValidationError if empty)
On blob attachment missing: Status=SentToGatewayFailed, logs Fatal
Status result mapped to SmsStatusCode enum

observations: Blob attachments (from SmsGroup profile storage) handled separately from inline DB attachments (EmailAttachment table)
Temp path: AZ_BATCH_TASK_WORKING_DIR env var or ApplicationData fallback
Distinct from EmailMessageWorkloadProcessor which handles email-from-SmsLog workflow

name: InboundEmailToSmsGateway
concept: Process inbound SendGrid webhook: deduplicate, whitelist-check, parse phone, trigger SMS send

observed_steps: SetupMessage() + IBroadcastSender.SendMessageSingleGroup() — fire-and-forget with ContinueWith error logging

observations: Deduplication is DB-based (cross-server) — code comment confirms: prevents duplicate SMS on repeated webhook calls
TryRegisterProcessedEmail() persistence uses ProcessedInboundEmail entity — that entity has mapping_status=CONFLICTING
conflict_note: Deduplication step (TryRegisterProcessedEmail) depends on ProcessedInboundEmail entity whose DB persistence mechanism is CONFLICTING (composite PK vs BaseEntity). Behavior observed and documented; persistence mechanics marked UNKNOWN pending Architect decision.

name: GetTemplateByNameEnum
concept: Retrieve localized email template, optionally wrap in master layout, apply static placeholder replacements

observed_steps: Fetches MasterTemplate and named EmailTemplate from DB by (languageId, name)
UseHtmlFromDb=false or null → load HTML from embedded assembly resource instead
If masterTemplateEnum != None and master found: replace $$MAIN_CONTENT$$ in master HTML with named template HTML

observations: UseHtmlFromDb controls DB vs file priority
Static constant placeholders replaced here; per-message dynamic fields replaced by MergeEmailFields()

name: MergeEmailFields
concept: Replace $$KEY$$ placeholders in email content with runtime values

observed_steps: Overload 1: mutates EmailTemplate.Html in-place; Overload 2: returns new string

observations: Null field values replaced with empty string
Placeholder format: $$KEY$$ — uppercase double-dollar

name: UpdateTemplatesFromEmbeddedResources
concept: Sync email template HTML from assembly-embedded resource files to database

observed_steps: Reads embedded HTML resource files from assembly

observations: Embedded resources are primary source; DB is override store (see UseHtmlFromDb in GetTemplateByNameEnum)
